description: Global CCUS Policy Database & Analysis Platform

policies.description: Global CCUS policies with analysis scores

facilities.description: Global CCUS facilities with capacity and location data

countries.description: Country governance profiles with regulatory pillars

quality.description: Data quality metrics and audit status

known_limitations: Facility-policy links are currently country-level only (low confidence)
Coordinate precision varies: exact, state, or country-level
Some policies may be missing source or URL
Chinese translations may not cover all fields
